Package org.areslib.pathplanner.path

Class PathPlannerTrajectory

java.lang.Object
org.areslib.pathplanner.path.PathPlannerTrajectory
public class PathPlannerTrajectory extends Object
Trajectory created from a pathplanner path

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    PathPlannerTrajectory.State
    A state along the trajectory

    Description

    Create a PathPlannerTrajectory from pre-generated states.

    Create a PathPlannerTrajectory from pre-generated states and event command timings.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PathPlannerTrajectory.State
    getEndState()
    Get the end state of the trajectory
    List<Pair<Double,Command>>
    getEventCommands()
    Get all of the pairs of timestamps + commands to run at those timestamps
    Pose2d
    getInitialDifferentialPose()
    Get this initial pose for a differential drivetrain
    PathPlannerTrajectory.State
    getInitialState()
    Get the initial state of the trajectory
    Pose2d
    getInitialTargetHolonomicPose()
    Get the initial target pose for a holonomic drivetrain NOTE: This is a "target" pose, meaning the rotation will be the value of the next rotation target along the path, not what the rotation should be at the start of the path
    PathPlannerTrajectory.State
    getState(int index)
    Get the goal state at the given index
    List<PathPlannerTrajectory.State>
    getStates()
    Get all of the pre-generated states in the trajectory
    double
    getTotalTimeSeconds()
    Get the total run time of the trajectory
    PathPlannerTrajectory.State
    sample(double time)
    Get the target state at the given point in time along the trajectory

  • Constructor Details

    • PathPlannerTrajectory

      public PathPlannerTrajectory(PathPlannerPath path, ChassisSpeeds startingSpeeds, Rotation2d startingRotation)
      Generate a PathPlannerTrajectory
      Parameters:
      path - PathPlannerPath to generate the trajectory for
      startingSpeeds - Starting speeds of the robot when starting the trajectory
      startingRotation - Starting rotation of the robot when starting the trajectory

    • PathPlannerTrajectory

      public PathPlannerTrajectory(List<PathPlannerTrajectory.State> states, List<Pair<Double,Command>> eventCommands)
      Create a PathPlannerTrajectory from pre-generated states and event command timings.
      Parameters:
      states - Pre-generated trajectory states
      eventCommands - Pairs of timestamps + commands to run at those timestamps

    • PathPlannerTrajectory

      public PathPlannerTrajectory(List<PathPlannerTrajectory.State> states)
      Create a PathPlannerTrajectory from pre-generated states.
      Parameters:
      states - Pre-generated trajectory states

  • Method Details

    • sample

      public PathPlannerTrajectory.State sample(double time)
      Get the target state at the given point in time along the trajectory
      Parameters:
      time - The time to sample the trajectory at in seconds
      Returns:
      The target state

    • getStates

      public List<PathPlannerTrajectory.State> getStates()
      Get all of the pre-generated states in the trajectory
      Returns:
      List of all states

    • getEventCommands

      public List<Pair<Double,Command>> getEventCommands()
      Get all of the pairs of timestamps + commands to run at those timestamps
      Returns:
      Pairs of timestamps and event commands

    • getTotalTimeSeconds

      public double getTotalTimeSeconds()
      Get the total run time of the trajectory
      Returns:
      Total run time in seconds

    • getState

      public PathPlannerTrajectory.State getState(int index)
      Get the goal state at the given index
      Parameters:
      index - Index of the state to get
      Returns:
      The state at the given index

    • getInitialState

      public PathPlannerTrajectory.State getInitialState()
      Get the initial state of the trajectory
      Returns:
      The initial state

    • getInitialTargetHolonomicPose

      public Pose2d getInitialTargetHolonomicPose()
      Get the initial target pose for a holonomic drivetrain NOTE: This is a "target" pose, meaning the rotation will be the value of the next rotation target along the path, not what the rotation should be at the start of the path
      Returns:
      The initial target pose

    • getInitialDifferentialPose

      public Pose2d getInitialDifferentialPose()
      Get this initial pose for a differential drivetrain
      Returns:
      The initial pose

      public PathPlannerTrajectory.State getEndState()
      Get the end state of the trajectory
      Returns:
      The end state
